# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

Draton is still pre-release software. Security fixes are currently applied to the
active development branch only.

| Version | Supported |
| --- | --- |
| `main` | Yes |
| released tags before `1.0.0` | No guaranteed backports |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Please do not report security vulnerabilities through public GitHub issues.

Instead, email the maintainers at `lhquangmink@gmail.com` with:

- A description of the issue
- Affected components or crates
- Reproduction steps or a proof of concept
- Any impact assessment you have
- Your preferred contact information for follow-up

We will acknowledge receipt as quickly as possible and work with you on validation,
impact, and remediation. If the report is confirmed, we will coordinate a fix and
responsible disclosure timeline.

## Disclosure Policy

- We prefer private disclosure first so fixes can be prepared safely.
- Once a fix is available, we may publish an advisory or release notes describing the
  issue and remediation guidance.
- We will credit reporters who want attribution unless they prefer to remain anonymous.
